subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the Most Luminous Beauty of Abhá, behold the boundless grace, for the effulgence of supreme guidance hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون جمال انور ابهی فضل بیمنتها را ملاحظه نما که پرتو هدایت کبری بتابید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @thankfulness; gratitude, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @the power of words; of speech
